text.content: As the world’s leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment, Caterpillar machines have proven to be innovative, reliable and versatile in the toughest environments for over 90 years. MAXAM specialty tires have over half a century of proven performance behind them – manufactured in state-of-the-art facilities with advanced construction and rugged design.
